message:
fix(cli): use saturating_sub for reservation remaining time calculation

CLI file_reservations list computed `expires - now_us` with bare
subtraction. For expired reservations (expires < now_us), the result
is negative, which is intentional for display but could panic in
debug mode. Now uses saturating_sub for consistency with the project's
timestamp arithmetic convention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
